title: Remove global ref in implicit baroclinic wave

body:
This PR adds dry held suarez experiments with rho etot and rho theta as prog var for testing purposes. 

Apart from the hs forcing, it also adds the flux correction and a simple sponge layer to rhs for stabilization.

At this moment, it can run for 100 ~ over 200 days depending on the set ups. We would like to merge it to the main so that @charleskawczynski could start to improve performance while we work on stabilize it.
title: dry held suarez
